Right longest: 8

Left winner: I win, C none, AND none, OR none, XOR none, AND-NOT lost, OR-NOT lost
Right winner: I win, C none, AND none, OR lost, XOR none, AND-NOT lost, OR-NOT lost

Longest Left: I 6-0 7-1 0-2 1-3 2-4 3-5 4-6 5-7 complete

8 + 8 = 16 > 8
Right will be truncated to length 8 - 8 = 0
